summary: Ralph Iteration 3 - Advanced to Test Stage: Transitioned from dev stage (98/100) to test stage with excellent test metrics. Client tests: 115/115 passing (89.92% line coverage). Server tests: 58/58 passing (96.06% line coverage). Combined coverage: 93.39% lines, 92.50% statements. Test score calculation: Unit test coverage 93.39% (exceeds 80% requirement) = 50/50 points + Integration test pass rate 100% (all 173 tests) = 50/50 points = 100/100 total. All API endpoints from SD.md are covered by integration tests (locations, reviews, favorites, auth, health). Zero vulnerabilities, zero TypeScript errors, zero linting issues. Ready to advance to security stage.
